categories.title: Deployment & Infrastructure
categories.description: Railway migration, marketing site, CI/CD, monitoring

tasks.title: Apply session-tracking DB migration (UserSession, UserMetrics, UserDeletionLog)
instructions: Open Supabase SQL Editor: https://supabase.com/dashboard/project/oaogpsshewmcazhehryl/sql/new
Open the migration file in your editor: prisma/migrations/20260413200000_add_user_session_tracking/migration.sql
Copy the ENTIRE contents (all 95 lines)
Paste into the Supabase SQL editor text area
Click the green 'Run' button in the top-right (or Cmd+Enter / Ctrl+Enter)
Expect 'Success. No rows returned' in green at the bottom — this is correct for CREATE TABLE
Verify: paste `SELECT table_name FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema = 'public' AND table_name IN ('UserSession', 'UserMetrics', 'UserDeletionLog');` and Run — should see 3 rows
Rollback if anything goes wrong: DROP TABLE "UserSession", "UserMetrics", "UserDeletionLog" CASCADE;
Once verified, mark this task done and tell Claude 'migration applied'
tasks.notes: One-time step. Creates 3 new tables — touches nothing existing. Safe; fully reversible via DROP TABLE CASCADE.

tasks.title: Set IP_HASH_SECRET env var in Railway
instructions: Open Railway dashboard: https://railway.app/dashboard
Click your FBST API service
Click the 'Variables' tab
Click 'New Variable' (or '+ Add Variable')
Name: IP_HASH_SECRET
Value: ef742c7673969de89e64867f6a98a82287cbc479424d30caf30a9c5b050f7cea
Click Save — Railway will trigger a redeploy automatically (~2 min)
Verify deploy succeeded: check Railway 'Deployments' tab, most recent should be green
Come back and tell Claude 'env set' so we can push Phase B code
tasks.notes: 32-byte hex secret used by lib/ipHash.ts to HMAC user IPs before storing. Fail-fast at server boot if missing — that's intentional; the server will refuse to run without it so IPs never accidentally save raw to prod. Rotate yearly per plan R8.

tasks.title: Deploy marketing site to GitHub Pages
instructions: Push final marketing site build to thefantasticleagues-www repo
Configure GitHub Pages in repo settings (Settings → Pages → Source: GitHub Actions)
Add deploy workflow at .github/workflows/deploy.yml (Astro → gh-pages)
Point custom domain thefantasticleagues.com at GitHub Pages (CNAME file)
Verify HTTPS certificate provisioning and redirect from apex

tasks.title: GitHub Action for Monday blog auto-deploys
instructions: Create .github/workflows/monday-deploy.yml with cron schedule '0 13 * * 1' (6am PT Monday)
Trigger: workflow rebuilds the marketing site so date-gated blog posts appear
Verify in dry run with manual workflow_dispatch trigger

tasks.title: Stripe account + product setup
instructions: Create Stripe account (thefantasticleagues.com)
Create products: Pro ($29/season), Commissioner ($49/season)
Store STRIPE_SECRET_KEY and STRIPE_PUBLISHABLE_KEY in Railway env vars
Add webhook endpoint signing secret STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET

tasks.title: Stripe Checkout flow for Pro/Commissioner
instructions: Install @stripe/stripe-js and stripe (server) packages
Add POST /api/billing/checkout endpoint that creates a Stripe Checkout Session
Add webhook handler POST /api/billing/webhook to process checkout.session.completed
Update UserProfile schema with plan (free/pro/commissioner) and stripeCustomerId
Wire 'Upgrade' button on /pricing to Checkout
Add success/cancel return URLs (/pricing?success=1)

tasks.title: Email subscribe backend (POST /api/auth/subscribe)
instructions: Add EmailSubscription Prisma model: email, source, createdAt, unsubscribedAt
POST /api/auth/subscribe route validates email + upserts by email
Rate limit: 5 req/min per IP
Wire 'Notify Me' form on marketing landing page to this endpoint
Add admin endpoint GET /api/admin/subscribers to export list

tasks.title: Feature gating based on plan (free/pro/commissioner)
instructions: Create requirePlan(plan) middleware checking req.user.plan
Gate AI features (Weekly Insights, Draft Report) behind 'pro'
Gate Commissioner tools (auction admin, force-assign) behind 'commissioner'
Show upgrade prompt on gated features in UI

categories.title: Content & SEO
categories.description: Blog posts, SEO pages, marketing collateral

tasks.title: Apply blog formatting to posts 2-5
instructions: Post 1 has TL;DR + short-paragraph treatment; apply same to posts 2-5
Files: src/content/blog/*.md in thefantasticleagues-www repo
Add TL;DR frontmatter block at top, break paragraphs to 2-3 sentences max

tasks.title: SEO technical: sitemap, robots.txt, JSON-LD
instructions: Generate sitemap.xml at build time (Astro @astrojs/sitemap)
Add robots.txt allowing all, pointing to sitemap
Add JSON-LD Organization schema on homepage
Add JSON-LD BlogPosting schema on each post
Verify in Google Rich Results Test

tasks.title: GA4 + Google Search Console setup
instructions: Create GA4 property for thefantasticleagues.com
Add GA4 measurement ID as env var, inject via script tag
Verify ownership in Search Console via DNS TXT record
Submit sitemap.xml to Search Console
Set up conversion events (signup, subscribe, upgrade)

tasks.title: Trade PICK asset processing (schema exists, silently ignored)
instructions: TradeItem.assetType PICK exists in schema but processing is a no-op
Add DraftPick model or use TradeItem metadata for round/season
On trade process: transfer pick ownership in DraftPick table
UI: render PICK assets in TradePage with 'Round X / 2027' format
Add to trade reversal logic

tasks.title: Future draft dollars as trade asset
instructions: Add assetType FUTURE_BUDGET to TradeItem union
New field: seasonYear (e.g., 2027)
On trade process: create pending budget adjustment linked to a future Season
At season start: apply pending adjustments to team.budget
UI: 'Give/Get $X toward 2027 budget' in TradeAssetSelector

tasks.title: Waiver priority positions as trade asset
instructions: WAIVER_PRIORITY swap already supported (single-toggle in TradeAssetSelector)
Extend: allow trading specific priority positions forward (Period N priority)
Add priorityPeriodId to TradeItem
Process: store override in Team.waiverPriorityOverride scoped to period

tasks.title: Fix pre-existing test failures (standings, mlbSync, archive, etc.)
instructions: Run npm run test:server to list failures
Fix standings/__tests__/routes.test.ts: GET /season test cases (2 failures)
Fix players/__tests__/mlbSyncService.test.ts: syncPositionEligibility (5 failures)
Fix archive, periods, roster, waivers route tests
Goal: 0 failing tests in npm run test
tasks.notes: Shipped cf92977 (Session 62 cont.) — 'test: fix 27 pre-existing test failures — 0 failing suite'. Session 63 verified green: server 531 passed / 7 skipped / 0 failed; client 201 passed / 0 failed.

tasks.title: Reduce `as any` casts (~140 server + ~130 client)
instructions: Grep: 'as any' in server/src and client/src
Prioritize hottest files (auction/routes, Team.tsx)
Add proper interfaces/types where needed

tasks.title: Extract auction/routes.ts (~870 LOC) — TD-Q03 deferred
instructions: Real-time stateful system with in-memory state + timers; 72+ tests pass
Split into: auction/routes.ts (HTTP), auction/services/stateManager.ts (in-memory), auction/services/timers.ts
Ensure tests still pass after refactor

tasks.title: Automate FanGraphs weekly audit (currently manual)
instructions: Write script fetching FBST team stats + FanGraphs NL team stats
Compare all 10 categories, flag diffs > 5% or stat > 10 units
Run weekly via cron, email/post to admin
Store audit results in AuditLog for history
